body_shape: round seashell-shaped body, like a smooth clam with a pearly belly, small stubby arms, a long fin-like tail curling behind
mouth_pose: soft plump human-like lips pursed forward in a gentle kissing pucker as if blowing a slow kiss, clearly visible upper and lower lip edges outlined in bold ink, lips drawn in a warm pink hue, a tiny round opening at the very center, no teeth and no tongue visible, absolutely not a beak not a snout not a muzzle, classic /ʃ/ shushing kiss-face
sound_gesture: one long slender arm extended upward in front of the face with a single index finger raised vertically directly in front of the closed lips in the universal be-quiet shushing sign, other short stubby arm hanging at the side, one eye winking
word_decor: paper sailor hat shaped like a small ship on top of the head
curved seashell headpieces jutting like horns

voice.character_description: young mischievous whispery boy, softly spoken with playful cadence, subtle wind-like breath

clips.greet: Shhh! You made it. Can you hear my sound?
clips.friday_acknowledge: You found my sound. Now I am yours to remember.
